question: Based on the median income map, which statement best describes the relationship between these states?

options.A: The highlighted states all have very diverse median income levels.
options.B: The median income differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.
options.C: The median income gap between Pennsylvania and Montana might exceed that between Vermont and Wyoming.
options.D: Pennsylvania and Montana have similar median incomes.

explanation: Pennsylvania (56.1$k) and Montana (60.3$k) have a 4.2$k median income difference, while Vermont (54.8$k) and Wyoming (55.3$k) have only a 0.5$k difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Pennsylvania and Montana into the same color bin (55-65$k range), making their large difference appear similar, while Vermont and Wyoming appear more different due to different color bins.
